description: Add persistent notification read state, list controls, and filtering.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state saved across sessions so that unread and read items stay consistent when I return.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification records persist read and unread state per user
Existing unread notifications default to unread until changed by the user
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge and open notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and notification center entry point so that I can see when attention is needed and open my notifications quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation or header shows unread notification count when unread items exist
Clicking the notification entry point opens the notification center list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notifications read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage which items still need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification item provides read and unread actions
Changing read state updates persisted notification state for the current user
Unread badge count updates after read-state changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notification list by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or previously handled items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center provides filter options for All, Unread, and Read
Changing the filter updates the visible notification list without mutating notification data
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that I can remove completed items from my list.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center provides a clear action that targets only read notifications
Clear action removes or archives read notifications while leaving unread notifications intact
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
